pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly sets DATA_FILE to this path and downloads the data into it.
The task description instructs the agent to save the BEAM-DIMAP product to this exact path.
The task description instructs the agent to export the final product as a GeoTIFF to this exact path.
setup_task.sh downloads from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif. Internal GDAL metadata confirms it is LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real Landsat 7 TOA multi-spectral GeoTIFF downloaded from opengeos/data on GitHub to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The downloaded data is an 8-bit image (uint8) with bands named B1, B2, B3, B4, contradicting the task description claim that it is a 16-bit GeoTIFF containing SWIR1, NIR, Red, Green bands. The expected output paths are explicitly stated in the task description: /home/ga/snap_exports/ml_normalized.dim for the DIMAP product and /home/ga/snap_exports/ml_normalized_output.tif for the GeoTIFF export. The evaluation script is lenient, only verifying that a new .dim and .tif file are created in /home/ga/snap_exports/ containing the correct virtual log and rescaling bands, but the metadata correctly reflects the paths assigned in the prompt.
